name: convert_lead_to_candidate
description: Convert a lead to a candidate and remove the original lead.
examples: REX, convert this lead to a candidate.
REX, convert lead 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000 to a candidate.
Convert e005171f-cdb2-4f53-9973-de44767297da to a candidate

name: sourceLeads
description: Source leads from Apollo or LinkedIn into a specific campaign.
examples: REX, source 10 product managers for this role.
REX, pull 20 Apollo leads for my SDR campaign.
REX, find top leads in my campaign who opened but didn't reply.

name: enrichLead
description: Enrich a lead using Apollo to find email and other data.
examples: REX, enrich this lead with a personal email.
REX, enrich this batch of leads with emails.
REX, enrich this lead with a verified email.

name: enrichLeadProfile
description: Find and enrich a lead's profile using name and LinkedIn URL to get comprehensive information including contact details, professional background, and more.
examples: REX, enrich John Smith's profile. LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/johnsmith
REX, enrich Jane Doe's profile with LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/jane-doe and email: jane@company.com
REX, enrich this candidate's profile: Sales Navigator: linkedin.com/sales/lead/123456
REX, find and enrich Mike Johnson's profile from LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/mikejohnson

name: sendMessage
description: Send or draft a personalized outreach message for a candidate.
examples: REX, write a 3-step cold email sequence for this candidate.
REX, create a follow-up message for someone who opened but didn't reply.

name: getPipelineStats
description: Fetch candidates by campaign stage.
examples: REX, show me all candidates in the Phone Screen stage.
REX, who hasn't moved stages in 7 days?

name: moveCandidate
description: Move a candidate to a new stage in the hiring pipeline.
examples: REX, move Jane Smith to Final Interview.

name: triggerZapier
description: Trigger a Zapier webhook automation.
examples: REX, trigger the Zapier webhook for SDR follow-up.

name: triggerMakeWorkflow
description: Trigger a Make.com workflow.
examples: REX, trigger the Make.com SDR follow-up workflow.

name: fetchCredits
description: Return the current user's available and used credit balance.
examples: REX, how many credits do I have left?
REX, explain what's using the most credits this week.

name: openHelpArticle
description: Open or summarize a help center article inside the REX UI.
examples: REX, open the support article on LinkedIn cookies.

name: getEmailStatus
description: Check the delivery or open status of a previously sent email.
examples: REX, did my message to Jordan get delivered?
REX, test my SendGrid API key.

name: generateApiKey
description: Create (or retrieve) the user's API key for Zapier/Make integrations.
examples: REX, create my API key for integrations.
REX, do I have an API key already?

name: registerWebhook
description: Store a Zapier/Make Catch-Hook URL for a specific event and return the signing secret.
examples: REX, save this Zapier hook for lead.created events.
REX, use my Make URL for pipeline stage changes.

name: listZapierEndpoints
description: Return fully-qualified endpoint URLs for actions and triggers.
examples: REX, show me the API endpoints for Zapier.

name: listSenders
description: List available sender addresses (SendGrid, Google, Outlook) the user can choose from.
examples: REX, which email senders can I use?

name: scheduleBulkMessages
description: Schedule a templated email to multiple leads at a specific date/time.
examples: REX, schedule the SDR follow-up template for these 50 leads tomorrow at 9 AM using jobs@acme.co.

name: linkedin_connect
description: Queue LinkedIn connection requests to one or more profiles with optional personal message.
examples: REX, send LinkedIn requests to these 5 leads with a personal message.
REX, connect with this lead on LinkedIn.
REX, schedule LinkedIn connection requests for tomorrow at 10 AM.
Send LinkedIn request to this lead with message: 'Hi #firstName#, I'd love to connect...'

name: viewPipeline
description: Get a structured list of candidates in each pipeline stage for a specific job with filtering options.
examples: REX, show me all candidates in the Interview stage for the Revenue Ops role.
REX, who's been in Phone Screen for more than 7 days?
REX, list all candidates in the Offer stage.
REX, summarize candidate notes for the Sales Executive job.
REX, show me candidates named John in the pipeline.
REX, who's stuck in the Application stage for over 10 days?

name: moveCandidateStage
description: Move a candidate to a different pipeline stage with role-based access control and confirmation flow.
examples: REX, move John Smith to the Interview stage.
REX, advance candidate 45f8-92ab into Offer.
REX, update this candidate's stage to Rejected.
REX, confirm moving Jane Doe to Phone Screen.
REX, move candidate to Technical Interview stage.
REX, advance this candidate to Final Interview.

name: updateCandidateNotes
description: Add a note or comment for a candidate to enable collaboration and history tracking.
examples: REX, add a note for Alice Johnson: 'Follow up after next interview.'
REX, comment on Bob Smith: 'Needs stronger SaaS background.'
REX, add note to cand123: 'Confirmed availability for Tuesday.'
REX, record observation for this candidate: 'Great technical skills, needs soft skills training.'

name: sniper_sn_lead_search
description: Use the Cloud Engine in Agent Mode to scrape leads from a LinkedIn Sales Navigator search URL. Queues a browser automation job that extracts lead profiles from the search results. Returns a job_id — use sniper_poll_leads to check results.
examples: REX, pull leads from this Sales Navigator URL: https://www.linkedin.com/sales/search/people?...
REX, scrape leads from my SN search: https://www.linkedin.com/sales/search/people?recentSearchId=123
REX, use the cloud engine to extract leads from this Sales Navigator search
Pull 50 leads from this SN link
REX, import leads from Sales Navigator search URL

name: sniper_people_search
description: Use the Cloud Engine in Agent Mode to scrape profiles from a LinkedIn people search URL. Queues a browser automation job. Returns a job_id — use sniper_poll_leads to check results.
examples: REX, scrape profiles from this LinkedIn search: https://www.linkedin.com/search/results/people?...
REX, pull people from this LinkedIn search URL
REX, use the cloud engine to find profiles from this LinkedIn search

name: sniper_poll_leads
description: Check the status and results of a Cloud Engine extraction job. Returns extracted profiles with name, headline, and profile URL. Use after sniper_sn_lead_search or sniper_people_search.
examples: REX, check the results of my lead search job
REX, poll for the extracted leads from job abc-123
REX, are my Sales Navigator leads ready yet?
REX, show me the profiles from my last cloud engine run

name: sniper_sn_connect
description: Use the Cloud Engine in Agent Mode to send LinkedIn Sales Navigator connection requests to one or more profiles with an optional personal note.
examples: REX, send SN connection requests to these profiles
REX, connect with these leads on Sales Navigator with a personal note
REX, use the cloud engine to send connect requests to these 10 profiles

name: sniper_sn_inmail
description: Use the Cloud Engine in Agent Mode to send LinkedIn Sales Navigator InMail messages to one or more profiles.
examples: REX, send InMail to these profiles via Sales Navigator
REX, use the cloud engine to InMail these leads
REX, send a Sales Navigator InMail to this profile about our open role

name: sniper_sn_message
description: Use the Cloud Engine in Agent Mode to send LinkedIn Sales Navigator messages to 1st-degree connections.
examples: REX, message these connections on Sales Navigator
REX, send SN messages to these profiles
REX, use the cloud engine to message my 1st-degree connections on SN

name: sniper_import_to_leads
description: Import extracted profiles from a Cloud Engine run into the leads table for a campaign. Use after sniper_poll_leads returns profiles.
examples: REX, import the extracted profiles into my leads
REX, save these scraped profiles to my campaign leads
REX, add the cloud engine results to my lead list

name: sniper_get_status
description: Check the Cloud Engine status including whether it's enabled, LinkedIn connection state, quota usage, and recent job activity.
examples: REX, is my cloud engine running?
REX, check my cloud engine status
REX, is my LinkedIn connected for the cloud engine?
REX, how many cloud engine actions have I used today?

name: sniper_list_jobs
description: List recent Cloud Engine jobs with their status, type, and creation time.
examples: REX, show my recent cloud engine jobs
REX, list my last 10 cloud engine runs
REX, what cloud engine missions have I run recently?

name: sniper_decision_makers
description: Use the Cloud Engine in Agent Mode to find decision makers at a company by scraping LinkedIn company pages.
examples: REX, find the decision makers at Stripe
REX, use the cloud engine to find VPs and Directors at this company
REX, who are the key people at Airbnb engineering?

name: sniper_jobs_intent
description: Use the Cloud Engine in Agent Mode to extract job postings from a LinkedIn search URL for intent-based prospecting.
examples: REX, find companies hiring for this role from this LinkedIn jobs URL
REX, use the cloud engine to mine job intent signals
REX, extract job postings from this search for prospecting
